/usr/bin/ar qc libnebu_video.a CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/2d.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/benchmark.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/camera.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/console.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/extgl.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/font.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/geometry.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/light.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/mesh.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/mesh_3ds.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/mesh_3ds.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/mesh_shadow.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/nebu_video_system.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/pixels.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/png_texture.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/scene.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/texture2d.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/vector.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/video_system.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/video_system_android.c.o CMakeFiles/nebu_video.dir/video_utility.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libnebu_video.a
